items.title: TREM2 in neurodegenerative diseases and acute neurological injuries: mechanisms to targeted therapies.
items.authors: Haixia Wang; Ruiming Wen; Emily Parker; Luodan Yang
items.abstract: Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2 (TREM2) is a critical myeloid receptor expressed on the surface of central nervous system microglia, capable of integrating signals from lipids, damage-associated molecular patterns, and abnormal protein aggregates to regulate phagocytosis, metabolic adaptation, inflammatory remodeling, and pathology-associated responses. Accumulating evidence indicates that TREM2 is neither uniformly protective nor uniformly pathogenic; rather, its biological effects are highly context-dependent, governed collectively by disease stage, pathological substrates, cellular compartments, and the local microenvironment. By coupling with TYROBP/DAP12 or DAP10, TREM2 actively drives the state remodeling of pathology-associated microglia. It profoundly influences the onset and progression of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Alzheimer's disease (AD), Parkinson's disease (PD), multiple sclerosis (MS), and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), as well as acute central nervous system injuries, including ischemic stroke, spinal cord injury (SCI), and traumatic brain injury (TBI). Concurrently, soluble TREM2 (sTREM2) holds significant potential not only as a biomarker but also as a context-dependent effector molecule actively participating in pathological regulation. This review synthesizes current advancements by focusing on four core themes: the structural and signaling logic of the TREM2 axis; its regulation of disease-associated microglia (DAM) remodeling; the cross-disease significance of sTREM2; and the mechanistic basis for the divergent outcomes observed with TREM2-targeted therapies across different experimental models and disease stages. The objective is to elucidate the context-dependent roles of TREM2 by analyzing consensus mechanisms, sources of discrepancy, and translational implications, thereby providing a theoretical framework and strategic direction for more precise TREM2-targeted interventions.

items.title_cn: TREM2 在神经退行性疾病和急性神经损伤中的作用：靶向治疗的机制。
items.abstract_cn: 骨髓细胞表达触发受体 2 (TREM2) 是中枢神经系统小胶质细胞表面表达的关键骨髓受体，能够整合来自脂质、损伤相关分子模式和异常蛋白质聚集体的信号，以调节吞噬作用、代谢适应、炎症重塑和病理相关反应。越来越多的证据表明，TREM2 既不具有一致的保护作用，也不具有一致的致病性；相反，其生物学效应高度依赖于环境，受疾病阶段、病理基质、细胞区室和局部微环境共同控制。通过与 TYROBP/DAP12 或 DAP10 结合，TREM2 主动驱动病理相关小胶质细胞的状态重塑。它深刻影响神经退行性疾病，如阿尔茨海默病（AD）、帕金森病（PD）、多发性硬化症（MS）和肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS），以及急性中枢神经系统损伤，包括缺血性中风、脊髓损伤（SCI）和创伤性脑损伤（TBI）。同时，可溶性 TREM2 (sTREM2) 不仅作为生物标志物，而且作为积极参与病理调节的背景依赖性效应分子，具有巨大的潜力。这篇综述通过关注四个核心主题来综合当前的进展：TREM2 轴的结构和信号逻辑；其对疾病相关小胶质细胞（DAM）重塑的调节； sTREM2 的跨疾病意义；以及 TREM2 靶向疗法在不同实验模型和疾病阶段观察到的不同结果的机制基础。目的是通过分析共识机制、差异来源和转化影响来阐明 TREM2 的上下文相关作用，从而为更精确的 TREM2 靶向干预提供理论框架和战略方向。

items.title: Human Umbilical Cord Mesenchymal Stem Cells in Metabolic Dysfunction-associated Fatty Liver Disease (MAFLD) Therapy: Mechanisms, Clinical Efficacy, and Future Perspectives.
items.authors: Hua Jiang; Hui Wang; Yankun Zhu; Chunyan Yi; Jinli Liu; Ruisi Zhao; Jianpeng Gao; Anmin Cao
items.abstract: There is currently no approved drug treatment for metabolic dysfunction-related fatty liver disease (MAFLD). Umbilical cord-derived mesenchymal stem cells (UC-MSCs) show therapeutic potential, but their mechanism of action is remains incompletely understood. Different from previous reviews that focused on a single pathway, this article presents three important contributions: First, it constructs an integrated "multi-target synergy network" model, clarifying how UC-MSCs coordinate and regulate the inflammatory, metabolic and fibrotic processes through the interactions between the AMPK/mTOR, Nrf2/HO-1 and TGF-β/Smad pathways; Second, it systematically assesses recent clinical trials (2022-2025), identifying several unaddressed barriers to transformation, including the lack of histological endpoint indicators, batch-to-batch differences, and the absence of dose exploration studies; Third, we integrate the latest developments from 2024 to 2025, particularly mitochondrial transfer (mediated by tunnel nanotubes and accompanied by quantitative efficacy data) and exosome circular RNA networks [Formula: see text], which have not been covered in previous reviews. Based on the above analysis, we also propose specific suggestions for standardized GMP production, mandatory genomic stability testing, and long-term safety registration. This review provides a comprehensive analysis of elaborates on the treatment of MAFLD with UC-MSCs from a mechanistic and translational perspective, based on the extensive updates of relevant literature.
items.title_en: Human Umbilical Cord Mesenchymal Stem Cells in Metabolic Dysfunction-associated Fatty Liver Disease (MAFLD) Therapy: Mechanisms, Clinical Efficacy, and Future Perspectives.
items.title_cn: 人脐带间充质干细胞在代谢功能障碍相关脂肪肝 (MAFLD) 治疗中的应用：机制、临床疗效和未来展望。
items.abstract_cn: 目前尚无批准的药物治疗代谢功能障碍相关的脂肪肝病（MAFLD）。脐带间充质干细胞 (UC-MSC) 显示出治疗潜力，但其作用机制仍不完全清楚。与以往关注单一通路的综述不同，本文提出了三个重要贡献：首先，构建了一个集成的“多靶点协同网络”模型，阐明了UC-MSCs如何通过AMPK/mTOR、Nrf2/HO-1和TGF-β/Smad通路之间的相互作用来协调和调节炎症、代谢和纤维化过程；其次，它系统地评估了最近的临床试验（2022-2025），确定了一些尚未解决的转化障碍，包括缺乏组织学终点指标、批次间差异以及缺乏剂量探索研究；第三，我们整合了2024年至2025年的最新进展，特别是线粒体转移（由隧道纳米管介导并附有定量功效数据）和外泌体环状RNA网络[公式：见正文]，这些在之前的评论中尚未涵盖。基于以上分析，我们还提出了规范GMP生产、强制基因组稳定性检测、长期安全注册等具体建议。本文在广泛更新相关文献的基础上，从机制和转化角度对 UC-MSCs 治疗 MAFLD 的详细阐述进行了全面分析。

items.title: NREP is involved in xenon's protection against ischemic stroke injury through modulating microglial M1 polarization and neuroinflammation.
items.authors: Shuangqiang Yi; Gang Wu; Qianqian Sun; Yunjie Qi; Jinliang Zhou
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Ischemic stroke (IS) is associated with high mortality and disability rates, and secondary neuroinflammation is a key driver of exacerbated neuronal damage. Xenon (Xe) exhibits neuroprotective effects, yet the specific mechanism by which it regulates microglia remains unclear. METHODS: Public transcriptome datasets of human stroke cortex (GSE56267) and Xe-treated microglia (GSE273575) were analyzed, and key genes were screened using machine learning. An oxygen-glucose deprivation/reoxygenation (OGD/R) model was established with human microglial cells (HMC3). NREP expression, microglial polarization, and inflammatory responses were assessed via Western blot, flow cytometry, and ELISA. HMC3 cells were co-cultured with human cortical neurons using Transwell inserts, and neuronal damage was evaluated by CCK-8 assay, kit-based detection, and flow cytometry. Finally, a middle cerebral artery occlusion (MCAO) model was established in rats to investigate the potential involvement of NREP in the neuroprotective effects of Xe in vivo. RESULTS: NREP was identified as a key regulatory gene that was downregulated after stroke and upregulated following Xe treatment. In the OGD/R model, Xe upregulated NREP expression in HMC3 cells, inhibited M1 polarization and proinflammatory cytokine release, and this effect could be partially reversed by NREP silencing. Xe-treated HMC3 cells mitigated apoptosis and oxidative stress in co-cultured neurons, which appeared to be, at least in part, dependent on NREP. In MCAO rats, Xe upregulated NREP in the brain and reduced infarct volume and neuroinflammation. Critically, in vivo knockdown of NREP significantly reversed these neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects of Xe. CONCLUSION: Xe treatment upregulated NREP expression, inhibited M1 polarization of microglia and neuroinflammation, and alleviated cerebral ischemia-reperfusion injury in experimental models. These findings suggest that NREP contributes to xenon-mediated neuroprotection and may serve as a potential therapeutic target, providing preliminary experimental evidence for subsequent translational research of IS.
items.title_en: NREP is involved in xenon's protection against ischemic stroke injury through modulating microglial M1 polarization and neuroinflammation.
items.title_cn: NREP 通过调节小胶质细胞 M1 极化和神经炎症参与氙对缺血性中风损伤的保护。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：缺血性中风（IS）与高死亡率和致残率相关，继发性神经炎症是神经元损伤加剧的关键驱动因素。氙（Xe）具有神经保护作用，但其调节小胶质细胞的具体机制仍不清楚。方法：分析人类中风皮质（GSE56267）和Xe处理的小胶质细胞（GSE273575）的公共转录组数据集，并使用机器学习筛选关键基因。利用人小胶质细胞（HMC3）建立了氧糖剥夺/复氧（OGD/R）模型。通过蛋白质印迹、流式细胞术和 ELISA 评估 NREP 表达、小胶质细胞极化和炎症反应。使用 Transwell 插入物将 HMC3 细胞与人皮质神经元共培养，并通过 CCK-8 测定、基于试剂盒的检测和流式细胞术评估神经元损伤。最后，在大鼠中建立大脑中动脉闭塞（MCAO）模型，以研究 NREP 在 Xe 体内神经保护作用中的潜在参与。结果：NREP 被确定为关键调控基因，在中风后下调，在 Xe 治疗后上调。在 OGD/R 模型中，Xe 上调 HMC3 细胞中 NREP 的表达，抑制 M1 极化和促炎细胞因子的释放，并且这种效应可以通过 NREP 沉默部分逆转。 Xe 处理的 HMC3 细胞减轻了共培养神经元的凋亡和氧化应激，这似乎至少部分依赖于 NREP。在 MCAO 大鼠中，Xe 上调大脑中的 NREP，减少梗塞体积和神经炎症。重要的是，体内敲低 NREP 显着逆转了 Xe 的神经保护和抗炎作用。结论：Xe治疗上调NREP表达，抑制小胶质细胞M1极化和神经炎症，减轻实验模型中的脑缺血再灌注损伤。这些发现表明NREP有助于氙介导的神经保护，并可能作为潜在的治疗靶点，为IS后续的转化研究提供初步的实验证据。

英文题目：NREP is involved in xenon's protection against ischemic stroke injury through modulating microglial M1 polarization and neuroinflammation.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：背景：缺血性中风（IS）与高死亡率和致残率相关，继发性神经炎症是神经元损伤加剧的关键驱动因素。氙（Xe）具有神经保护作用，但其调节小胶质细胞的具体机制仍不清楚。方法：分析人类中风皮质（GSE56267）和Xe处理的小胶质细胞（GSE273575）的公共转录组数据集，并使用机器学习筛选关键基因。利用人小胶质细胞（HMC3）建立了氧糖剥夺/复氧（OGD/R）模型。通过蛋白质印迹、流式细胞术和 ELISA 评估 NREP 表达、小胶质细胞极化和炎症反应。使用 Transwell 插入物将 HMC3 细胞与人皮质神经元共培养，并通过 CCK-8 测定、基于试剂盒的检测和流式细胞术评估神经元损伤。最后，在大鼠中建立大脑中动脉闭塞（MCAO）模型，以研究 NREP 在 Xe 体内神经保护作用中的潜在参与。结果：NREP 被确定为关键调控基因，在中风后下调，在 Xe 治疗后上调。在 OGD/R 模型中，Xe 上调 HMC3 细胞中 NREP 的表达，抑制 M1 极化和促炎细胞因子的释放，并且这种效应可以通过 NREP 沉默部分逆转。 Xe 处理的 HMC3 细胞减轻了共培养神经元的凋亡和氧化应激，这似乎至少部分依赖于 NREP。在 MCAO 大鼠中，Xe 上调大脑中的 NREP，减少梗塞体积和神经炎症。重要的是，体内敲低 NREP 显着逆转了 Xe 的神经保护和抗炎作用。结论：Xe治疗上调NREP表达，抑制小胶质细胞M1极化和神经炎症，减轻实验模型中的脑缺血再灌注损伤。这些发现表明NREP有助于氙介导的神经保护，并可能作为潜在的治疗靶点，为IS后续的转化研究提供初步的实验证据。

items.title: FPR2 deficiency alleviates LPS-induced depressive-like behaviors in mice by suppressing the microglial CSF1/NLRP3 inflammasome pathway.
items.authors: Hanqi Wang; Yijun Chen; Junna Chang; Zhen Liu; Yang Yu
items.abstract: Depression is one of the most prevalent psychiatric disorders worldwide, yet its pathogenesis remains unclear. Here, we aimed to investigate the effects of formyl peptide receptor 2 (FPR2), a key regulator of innate immunity and inflammation, on lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-induced depression-related behaviors in mice after intraperitoneal administration, and to elucidate its regulatory mechanisms in microglia. FPR2 knockout (Fpr2-/-) significantly attenuated LPS-induced depressive and anxiety-like behaviors in mice. LPS markedly increased FPR2 expression in microglia of the prefrontal cortex (PFC) and hippocampus, while only a minimal increase was observed in neurons. FPR2 deficiency alleviated LPS-induced microglial activation and reduced neuronal synaptic alterations. RNA sequencing and validation experiments confirmed that FPR2 deletion substantially decreased LPS-induced microglial NLRP3 inflammasome activation and IL-1β levels in the brain. Mechanistically, FPR2 regulated downstream NLRP3 activation by modulating CSF1, and FPR2/CSF1 activation was governed by its upstream ligand, serum amyloid A (SAA). Analysis of public clinical datasets revealed that SAA1 levels were significantly upregulated in the orbital ventral PFC of patients with major depressive disorder (MDD) and in the plasma of patients with late-life depression. These findings demonstrate that the SAA/FPR2/CSF1/NLRP3 pathway mediates LPS-induced depressive-like behaviors by regulating microglial activation and neuroinflammation.
items.title_en: FPR2 deficiency alleviates LPS-induced depressive-like behaviors in mice by suppressing the microglial CSF1/NLRP3 inflammasome pathway.
items.title_cn: FPR2 缺陷通过抑制小胶质细胞 CSF1/NLRP3 炎性体途径减轻 LPS 诱导的小鼠抑郁样行为。
items.abstract_cn: 抑郁症是世界范围内最普遍的精神疾病之一，但其发病机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们的目的是研究先天免疫和炎症的关键调节因子甲酰基肽受体2（FPR2）对腹腔给药后小鼠脂多糖（LPS）诱导的抑郁相关行为的影响，并阐明其在小胶质细胞中的调节机制。 FPR2 敲除 (Fpr2-/-) 显着减弱 LPS 诱导的小鼠抑郁和焦虑样行为。 LPS 显着增加前额叶皮层 (PFC) 和海马小胶质细胞中 FPR2 的表达，而在神经元中仅观察到极小的增加。 FPR2 缺陷减轻了 LPS 诱导的小胶质细胞激活并减少了神经元突触改变。 RNA测序和验证实验证实，FPR2缺失显着降低了LPS诱导的小胶质细胞NLRP3炎性体激活和大脑中IL-1β水平。从机制上讲，FPR2 通过调节 CSF1 来调节下游 NLRP3 的激活，而 FPR2/CSF1 的激活则由其上游配体血清淀粉样蛋白 A (SAA) 控制。对公共临床数据集的分析显示，重度抑郁症 (MDD) 患者的眼眶腹侧 PFC 和晚年抑郁症患者的血浆中 SAA1 水平显着上调。这些发现表明，SAA/FPR2/CSF1/NLRP3 通路通过调节小胶质细胞激活和神经炎症来介导 LPS 诱导的抑郁样行为。

items.title: Risk of epilepsy in people with adult-onset hydrocephalus: insights from the UK Biobank.
items.journal: Neurological sciences : official journal of the Italian Neurological Society and of the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology
items.authors: Jolanda Buonocore; Francesco Fortunato; Enrico Fratto; Ilaria Sammarra; Antonio Gambardella; Aldo Quattrone; Andrea Quattrone
items.abstract: AIM: We aim to determine whether individuals with adult-onset hydrocephalus have an increased risk of incident epilepsy over time. METHODS: We analysed data from the UK Biobank cohort. Diagnoses of "hydrocephalus" and "epilepsy" were identified through ICD-10-coded health records, excluding congenital and secondary cases. The association between these two diseases was investigated using logistic regression (adjusted for age and sex); subsequently, we performed a sampled cohort study to evaluate the hazard ratio (HR) for incident epilepsy in people with adult-onset hydrocephalus using Cox proportional hazards models with a dedicated sensitivity analysis including different sets of covariates such as demographic, lifestyle, vascular, and genetic factors. RESULTS: Our cohort included 483,790 controls, 5,028 individuals with epilepsy, and 320 with adult-onset hydrocephalus. Hydrocephalus and epilepsy were strongly associated (OR: 9.6, 95% CI: 6.4-13.8, p < 0.001). Adjusted Cox models demonstrated a markedly increased risk of incident epilepsy in people with adult-onset hydrocephalus, with HR values ranging from 14.62 (95% CI: 7.91-27.00, p < 0.001) to 23.80 (95% CI: 12.87-44.03, p < 0.001) across models, after adjusting for multiple covariates. Results were also consistent after excluding people with comorbid neurodegenerative dementias such as Alzheimer's disease. CONCLUSIONS: We demonstrated a markedly increased risk of epilepsy in adult-onset hydrocephalus, independent of vascular and neurodegenerative comorbidities and not attributable to shunt-related complications. These findings underscore the importance of increased diagnostic vigilance, as seizures may be under-recognized in this population, and support further research to clarify mechanisms and optimize management strategies.
items.title_en: Risk of epilepsy in people with adult-onset hydrocephalus: insights from the UK Biobank.
items.title_cn: 成人脑积水患者的癫痫风险：来自英国生物银行的见解。
items.abstract_cn: 目的：我们的目的是确定患有成人脑积水的个体是否会随着时间的推移而增加癫痫发作的风险。方法：我们分析了英国生物银行队列的数据。 “脑积水”和“癫痫”的诊断是通过 ICD-10 编码的健康记录确定的，不包括先天性和继发性病例。使用逻辑回归（根据年龄和性别进行调整）研究了这两种疾病之间的关联；随后，我们进行了一项抽样队列研究，使用 Cox 比例风险模型和专门的敏感性分析（包括不同组的协变量，如人口统计学、生活方式、血管和遗传因素）来评估成人发病脑积水患者癫痫发作的风险比 (HR)。结果：我们的队列包括 483,790 名对照者、5,028 名癫痫患者和 320 名成人脑积水患者。脑积水和癫痫密切相关（OR：9.6，95% CI：6.4-13.8，p < 0.001）。调整后的 Cox 模型显示，成人发病的脑积水患者发生癫痫的风险显着增加，在调整多个协变量后，各模型的 HR 值范围为 14.62（95% CI：7.91-27.00，p < 0.001）至 23.80（95% CI：12.87-44.03，p < 0.001）。排除患有阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性痴呆症的人后，结果也一致。结论：我们证明成人发病的脑积水的癫痫风险显着增加，与血管和神经退行性合并症无关，也不能归因于分流相关并发症。这些发现强调了提高诊断警惕性的重要性，因为癫痫在该人群中可能未被充分认识，并支持进一步研究以澄清机制和优化管理策略。

items.title: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
items.authors: Tommaso Croese; Catherine J Mummery; Noa Bregman; Dalia Bracha; Kuti Baruch; Alexander Kertser; Sharona Raveh; Eliezer Shochat
items.abstract: While Alzheimer's disease (AD) is initiated by amyloid plaque accumulation, its progression involves local neuroinflammation that the brain cannot resolve when age-related dysfunction of the systemic immune system limits peripheral immune support. Preclinical studies using rodent models showed that transient systemic blockade of programmed death-ligand 1 is associated with reduced neuroinflammation, neuroprotection and attenuation of disease progression. Based on the underlying mechanism, a new short-lived anti-programmed death-ligand 1 antibody with Fc-effector silencing and reduced FcRn binding (IBC-Ab002) was engineered. Here, we report a randomized, double-blind, phase 1b first-in-human trial in early AD, with safety and tolerability as the primary endpoint. Forty participants were enrolled across five ascending dose cohorts (1-30 mg kg-1), with dosing administered four times at 3-month intervals. Treatment was well tolerated, with no treatment-related serious adverse events or evidence of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities. Exploratory analyses at week 48 showed directional changes in cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers of neuronal and synaptic damage favoring the 30 mg kg-1 dose, although no doses reached statistical significance given the limited sample size. The safety and tolerability profile supports further clinical development of systemic, intermittently administered IBC-Ab002 in early AD. ClinicalTrials.gov registration: NCT05551741 .
items.title_en: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
items.title_cn: 使用短效抗 PD-L1 抗体治疗阿尔茨海默病的免疫疗法：1b 期、随机、双盲试验。
items.abstract_cn: 虽然阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是由淀粉样斑块积聚引发的，但其进展涉及局部神经炎症，当与年龄相关的全身免疫系统功能障碍限制外周免疫支持时，大脑无法解决这种炎症。使用啮齿动物模型进行的临床前研究表明，程序性死亡配体 1 的短暂全身阻断与神经炎症的减少、神经保护和疾病进展的减缓有关。基于潜在机制，设计了一种具有 Fc 效应子沉默和 FcRn 结合减少的新型短寿命抗程序性死亡配体 1 抗体 (IBC-Ab002)。在这里，我们报告了一项针对早期 AD 的随机、双盲、1b 期首次人体试验，以安全性和耐受性作为主要终点。 40 名参与者被纳入 5 个剂量递增队列（1-30 mg kg-1），每 3 个月给药 4 次。治疗耐受性良好，没有与治疗相关的严重不良事件或淀粉样蛋白相关成像异常的证据。第 48 周的探索性分析显示，神经元和突触损伤的脑脊液生物标志物发生方向性变化，有利于 30 mg kg-1 剂量，但考虑到样本量有限，没有任何剂量达到统计学显着性。安全性和耐受性概况支持在早期 AD 中系统性、间歇性给药 IBC-Ab002 的进一步临床开发。 ClinicalTrials.gov 注册：NCT05551741。

items.title: 3D nanoscale imaging of amyloid-β oligomer interactions with extracellular vesicles by cryo-ET.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Anum Khursheed; Qi Shang; Hui Zhang; Yao Tian; Piotr Szwedziak; Vladimir A Volkov; John H Viles
items.abstract: Central to Alzheimer's disease pathology are prefibrillar oligomer assemblies of amyloid-β (Aβ) peptide. A widely discussed hypothesis proposes that amyloid-β oligomers insert into neuronal lipid membranes, disrupting their integrity and causing a loss of cellular homeostasis in Alzheimer's disease. This membrane disruption is believed to be a major source of Aβ-induced neurotoxicity. Cryo electron tomography (cryo-ET) has facilitated 3D nanoscale imaging of Aβ-membrane interactions under near-native conditions. Analyses of small extracellular vesicles (sEVs) reveals that Aβ oligomers including annular and curvilinear extended oligomers (CLEOs) exhibit extensive binding to cell-derived lipid membranes, including insertion into and carpeting of the lipid bilayer. Notably, these oligomeric assemblies were also internalized and concentrated within the cell-derived exosomes and other small sEVs. Enrichment of Aβ oligomers within the vesicles typically ranged between 5 to 20 times the external Aβ levels depending on the vesicle size and curvature. In contrast, monomeric and fibrillar forms of Aβ displayed minimal membrane interaction. Once internalized CLEOs appear to be trapped in an oligomeric form and do not readily go on to form fibrils. Studies with vesicles of brain lipid extract indicate the Aβ internalization does not require the presence of a membrane protein. Our in vitro studies underscore the membrane-disruptive capacity of oligomeric Aβ species and suggest a role of sEVs in concentrating toxic Aβ oligomers and transporting oligomers across the brain interstitium.
items.title_en: 3D nanoscale imaging of amyloid-β oligomer interactions with extracellular vesicles by cryo-ET.
items.title_cn: 通过冷冻 ET 对淀粉样蛋白-β 寡聚物与细胞外囊泡相互作用进行 3D 纳米级成像。
items.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病病理学的核心是淀粉样蛋白-β (Aβ) 肽的前原纤维寡聚物组装体。一个广泛讨论的假设提出，β-淀粉样蛋白寡聚物插入神经元脂质膜中，破坏其完整性并导致阿尔茨海默病的细胞稳态丧失。这种膜破坏被认为是 Aβ 诱导的神经毒性的主要来源。冷冻电子断层扫描 (cryo-ET) 促进了在接近天然条件下对 Aβ 膜相互作用进行 3D 纳米级成像。对小细胞外囊泡 (sEV) 的分析表明，包括环形和曲线延伸寡聚物 (CLEO) 在内的 Aβ 寡聚物表现出与细胞来源的脂质膜的广泛结合，包括插入和覆盖脂质双层。值得注意的是，这些寡聚体组装体也被内化并集中在细胞来源的外泌体和其他小型 sEV 中。囊泡内 Aβ 寡聚物的富集通常为外部 Aβ 水平的 5 至 20 倍，具体取决于囊泡的大小和曲率。相比之下，Aβ 的单体和纤维形式表现出最小的膜相互作用。一旦内化，CLEO 似乎被困在寡聚形式中，并且不容易继续形成原纤维。对脑脂质提取物囊泡的研究表明，Aβ 内化不需要膜蛋白的存在。我们的体外研究强调了寡聚 Aβ 物种的膜破坏能力，并表明 sEV 在浓缩有毒 Aβ 寡聚体和跨脑间质运输寡聚体方面发挥作用。

items.title: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
items.authors: Yunchang Yang; XiangXiang Cao; Nan Feng; Xinyao Kang; Yaofeng Wang; Yunqin Sun
items.abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) is defined by extreme lethality and transcriptomic plasticity, but the signatures driving the most aggressive tumors remain incompletely defined. In this exploratory in silico study, TCGA-GBM patients were stratified using a strict 1-year overall survival threshold. We integrated differential expression analysis, WGCNA, single-cell RNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, and virtual knockout simulations. A high-risk signature centered on CCL2 and TIMP1 was identified. Single-cell and spatial mapping linked these genes to an inflammatory, macrophage-enriched microenvironment. The signature inversely correlated with neuronal synapse mimicry scores, suggesting that extreme aggressiveness involves a macroscopic shift from differentiated neuronal states toward an undifferentiated inflammatory phenotype. Virtual perturbation modeling confirmed CCL2 and TIMP1 as highly interconnected network hubs. Despite limitations inherent to computational and retrospective cohorts, our rigorous multi-omics validation identifies the CCL2/TIMP1 axis as a driver of potential prognostic indicator. These findings generate the hypothesis that these mediators reflect a critical inflammatory, mesenchymal-like tumor microenvironment shift, warranting independent cohort validation and experimental investigation.
items.title_en: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
items.title_cn: 探索性多组学将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴与胶质母细胞瘤中的免疫抑制 TME 联系起来。
items.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的定义是极高的致死率和转录组可塑性，但驱动最具侵袭性肿瘤的特征仍未完全确定。在这项探索性计算机研究中，TCGA-GBM 患者使用严格的 1 年总生存阈值进行分层。我们集成了差异表达分析、WGCNA、单细胞 RNA-seq、空间转录组学和虚拟敲除模拟。确定了以 CCL2 和 TIMP1 为中心的高风险特征。单细胞和空间图谱将这些基因与富含巨噬细胞的炎症微环境联系起来。该特征与神经元突触拟态评分呈负相关，表明极端攻击性涉及从分化的神经元状态向未分化的炎症表型的宏观转变。虚拟扰动模型证实 CCL2 和 TIMP1 是高度互连的网络中心。尽管计算和回顾性队列存在固有的局限性，但我们严格的多组学验证将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴确定为潜在预后指标的驱动因素。这些发现产生了这样的假设：这些介质反映了关键的炎症性、间质样肿瘤微环境的转变，需要独立的队列验证和实验研究。

items.title: Rag GTPases and mTORC1 regulate intestinal stem cell activity in response to nutrient availability.
items.authors: Weikang Fan; Churui Ge; Chunmei Niu; Shuang Liu; Peng Wang; Heng Li; Yang Cheng; Yingying Lu
items.abstract: The intestinal epithelium, predominantly composed of enterocytes (ECs), integrates dietary cues to regulate intestinal stem cell (ISC) activity and maintain intestinal homeostasis. However, the underlying mechanisms remain incompletely understood. Here, we demonstrate the functions of essential nutrient-sensing mediators Rag GTPases and mTORC1 on Drosophila ISC activity. Inhibition of Rag GTPases in ECs triggers Mitf activation, which subsequently induces Upd3 expression to non-cell autonomously increase the ISC proliferation and differentiation through stimulating the JAK-STAT pathway. Inactivation of mTORC1 in ECs also activates the Upd3-JAK-STAT axis and increases ISC activity, but through a Mitf-independent mechanism. Moreover, in contrast to mTORC1 inactivation blocking ISC proliferation and differentiation, depletion of Rag GTPases in ISCs shows no obvious cell autonomous effect on ISC activity. Consistent with inhibition of the nutrient-responsive pathway in ECs promoting ISC proliferation, long-term nutrient starvation enhances ISC activity and Upd3 expression. Together, our findings reveal a nutrient-sensing regulatory network that controls ISC proliferation involving the Rag GTPases-Mitf axis and mTORC1 activity.
items.title_en: Rag GTPases and mTORC1 regulate intestinal stem cell activity in response to nutrient availability.
items.title_cn: Rag GTPases 和 mTORC1 调节肠道干细胞活性以响应营养物质的可用性。
items.abstract_cn: 肠上皮主要由肠上皮细胞（EC）组成，整合饮食信号来调节肠干细胞（ISC）活性并维持肠道稳态。然而，其根本机制仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们展示了必需营养感应介质 Rag GTPases 和 mTORC1 对果蝇 ISC 活性的功能。 EC 中 Rag GTPases 的抑制触发 Mitf 激活，随后诱导非细胞 Upd3 表达，通过刺激 JAK-STAT 途径自主增加 ISC 增殖和分化。 EC 中 mTORC1 失活也会激活 Upd3-JAK-STAT 轴并增加 ISC 活性，但通过独立于 Mitf 的机制。此外，与 mTORC1 失活阻碍 ISC 增殖和分化相反，ISC 中 Rag GTPases 的消耗对 ISC 活性没有显示出明显的细胞自主效应。与抑制 EC 中促进 ISC 增殖的营养反应途径一致，长期营养饥饿会增强 ISC 活性和 Upd3 表达。总之，我们的研究结果揭示了一个控制 ISC 增殖的营养感应调控网络，涉及 Rag GTPases-Mitf 轴和 mTORC1 活性。

items.title: ROS produced in mitochondria entrapped by self-assembly peptide fibers for target therapy of glioma.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Suling Zhang; Fanchen Yu; Yang Yang; Yi Jia; Yongqiang Xu; Jin Zhou; Zeng-Ying Qiao; Jin Lu
items.abstract: Brain glioma is a highly energy-dependent malignant tumor. Sonodynamic therapy (SDT) provides a noninvasive and effective approach for brain glioma therapy. Reactive oxygen species (ROS) from sonosensitizers in the treatment of SDT play a key role. Inspired by spider webs, a self-assembling "spider peptide" (P1) bearing porphyrin moieties was constructed to generate ROS under ultrasound. In glioma cells, P1 forms web-like nanofibers that weave around mitochondria and enables ROS to release in situ. This efficiently disrupts the energy metabolism of mitochondria leading to the inhibition of glioma cells growth. Glioma-derived exosomes loaded with peptide P1 (Evs@P1) exhibit enhanced blood-brain barrier permeability and homotypic targeting to glioma cells. After endocytic uptake, Evs@P1 complexes undergo hydrolysis in the acidic lysosomal environment exposing the mitochondrial-targeting peptide. Ultrasound enhances the rate of peptide self-assembly into nanofibers, which are extruded from the exosomes and weave around the mitochondrial surface. Such an assembly of P1 nanofibers accelerates the ROS generation, which is 3.7 times higher than that in the monomeric state. It indicates an effective method to prevent glioma growth in mice brains in vivo.
items.title_en: ROS produced in mitochondria entrapped by self-assembly peptide fibers for target therapy of glioma.
items.title_cn: 线粒体中产生的ROS被自组装肽纤维捕获，用于神经胶质瘤的靶向治疗。
items.abstract_cn: 脑胶质瘤是一种高度能量依赖的恶性肿瘤。声动力疗法（SDT）为脑胶质瘤治疗提供了一种无创且有效的方法。声敏剂产生的活性氧 (ROS) 在 SDT 治疗中发挥着关键作用。受蜘蛛网的启发，构建了带有卟啉部分的自组装“蜘蛛肽”（P1），以在超声波下产生ROS。在神经胶质瘤细胞中，P1 形成网状纳米纤维，围绕线粒体编织，使 ROS 能够原位释放。这有效地破坏了线粒体的能量代谢，从而抑制神经胶质瘤细胞的生长。负载肽 P1 (Evs@P1) 的胶质瘤来源的外泌体表现出增强的血脑屏障通透性和对胶质瘤细胞的同型靶向性。内吞摄取后，Evs@P1 复合物在酸性溶酶体环境中发生水解，暴露线粒体靶向肽。超声波提高了肽自组装成纳米纤维的速率，纳米纤维从外泌体中挤出并编织在线粒体表面周围。 P1纳米纤维的这种组装加速了ROS的产生，比单体状态高3.7倍。这表明了一种在体内预防小鼠脑胶质瘤生长的有效方法。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: CSF1R inhibition exacerbates gamma oscillation disruption and induces network hyperexcitability in APP/PS1 mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Hugh J Delaney; Sadia Islam; Dáire Healy; Ross Oglesby; Meghamsh Konda; Gudo M Rietman; Rebecca Lynch; Arshed Nazmi
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's Disease is the most common neurodegenerative disease worldwide, but significant gaps in pathophysiological understanding have hampered development of disease-modifying therapies. In Alzheimer's disease, neurophysiological function is impaired, with gamma frequency oscillations - thought to be essential for higher-order cognitive processes - disrupted in both patients and animal models. However, the mechanisms driving these disruptions are unclear and, in particular, the role of neuroinflammation in these changes is poorly understood. In this study, we investigated neuronal network dynamics in acute brain slices from APP/PS1 transgenic mice. Gamma frequency oscillations had significantly reduced amplitude in APP/PS1 brain slices at 9-11 months, accompanied by an increase in beta frequency power and heightened epileptiform activity. This is suggestive of a slowing in neuronal oscillations, considered a neurophysiological hallmark of Alzheimer's disease. Immunohistochemical analysis revealed a reduction in parvalbumin- and somatostatin-positive inhibitory interneuron populations. Treatment with gabazine demonstrated increased network sensitivity to GABAA receptor antagonism, further indicating compromised inhibitory control in APP/PS1. As these altered oscillatory dynamics correlated with microglial reactivity, we hypothesised a causal role for microglia. Administration of the CSF1R inhibitor GW2580 reduced microglial proliferation, attenuated development of the disease-associated microglial phenotype and partially rescued synaptic loss; but, had no significant impact on amyloid plaque burden or cognitive deficits. Unexpectedly, GW2580 treatment exacerbated neuronal network hyperactivity and the incidence and complexity of epileptiform activity. Microglia in GW2580-treated mice showed reduced CD68 expression and decreased engulfment of synaptic elements, potentially facilitating the persistence of hyperexcitable synapses. These findings support a role of microglia in regulating neuronal network homeostasis and caution against indiscriminate suppression of microglial activity in Alzheimer's disease. Therapeutic strategies targeting microglia must account for their homeostatic functions to avoid adverse effects on neuronal network stability.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: CSF1R inhibition exacerbates gamma oscillation disruption and induces network hyperexcitability in APP/PS1 mice.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: CSF1R 抑制会加剧 APP/PS1 小鼠的 γ 振荡破坏并诱导网络过度兴奋。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默氏病是全世界最常见的神经退行性疾病，但病理生理学理解上的巨大差距阻碍了疾病缓解疗法的发展。在阿尔茨海默病中，神经生理功能受损，伽马频率振荡（被认为对高阶认知过程至关重要）在患者和动物模型中都受到干扰。然而，驱动这些破坏的机制尚不清楚，特别是神经炎症在这些变化中的作用知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们研究了 APP/PS1 转基因小鼠急性脑切片的神经元网络动力学。 9-11 个月时，APP/PS1 脑切片中的伽马频率振荡幅度显着降低，同时伴随着贝塔频率功率的增加和癫痫样活动的增强。这表明神经元振荡减慢，被认为是阿尔茨海默病的神经生理学标志。免疫组织化学分析显示小白蛋白和生长抑素阳性抑制性中间神经元群体减少。加巴嗪治疗表明网络对 GABAA 受体拮抗作用的敏感性增加，进一步表明 APP/PS1 的抑制控制受损。由于这些改变的振荡动力学与小胶质细胞反应性相关，我们假设小胶质细胞具有因果作用。使用 CSF1R 抑制剂 GW2580 可减少小胶质细胞增殖，减弱疾病相关小胶质细胞表型的发育，并部分挽救突触损失；但是，对淀粉样斑块负担或认知缺陷没有显着影响。出乎意料的是，GW2580 治疗加剧了神经元网络过度活跃以及癫痫样活动的发生率和复杂性。 GW2580 治疗小鼠的小胶质细胞显示 CD68 表达减少，突触元件吞噬减少，可能促进过度兴奋突触的持续存在。这些发现支持小胶质细胞在调节神经元网络稳态中的作用，并警告不要不加区别地抑制阿尔茨海默病中的小胶质细胞活动。针对小胶质细胞的治疗策略必须考虑……

【文献速递】CSF1R 抑制会加剧 APP/PS1 小鼠的 γ 振荡破坏并诱导网络过度兴奋。

英文题目：CSF1R inhibition exacerbates gamma oscillation disruption and induces network hyperexcitability in APP/PS1 mice.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：阿尔茨海默氏病是全世界最常见的神经退行性疾病，但病理生理学理解上的巨大差距阻碍了疾病缓解疗法的发展。在阿尔茨海默病中，神经生理功能受损，伽马频率振荡（被认为对高阶认知过程至关重要）在患者和动物模型中都受到干扰。然而，驱动这些破坏的机制尚不清楚，特别是神经炎症在这些变化中的作用知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们研究了 APP/PS1 转基因小鼠急性脑切片的神经元网络动力学。 9-11 个月时，APP/PS1 脑切片中的伽马频率振荡幅度显着降低，同时伴随着贝塔频率功率的增加和癫痫样活动的增强。这表明神经元振荡减慢，被认为是阿尔茨海默病的神经生理学标志。免疫组织化学分析显示小白蛋白和生长抑素阳性抑制性中间神经元群体减少。加巴嗪治疗表明网络对 GABAA 受体拮抗作用的敏感性增加，进一步表明 APP/PS1 的抑制控制受损。由于这些改变的振荡动力学与小胶质细胞反应性相关，我们假设小胶质细胞具有因果作用。使用 CSF1R 抑制剂 GW2580 可减少小胶质细胞增殖，减弱疾病相关小胶质细胞表型的发育，并部分挽救突触损失；但是，对淀粉样斑块负担或认知缺陷没有显着影响。出乎意料的是，GW2580 治疗加剧了神经元网络过度活跃以及癫痫样活动的发生率和复杂性。 GW2580 治疗小鼠的小胶质细胞显示 CD68 表达减少，突触元件吞噬减少，可能促进过度兴奋突触的持续存在。这些发现支持小胶质细胞在调节神经元网络稳态中的作用，并警告不要不加区别地抑制阿尔茨海默病中的小胶质细胞活动。针对小胶质细胞的治疗策略必须考虑……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Tommaso Croese; Catherine J Mummery; Noa Bregman; Dalia Bracha; Kuti Baruch; Alexander Kertser; Sharona Raveh; Eliezer Shochat
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: While Alzheimer's disease (AD) is initiated by amyloid plaque accumulation, its progression involves local neuroinflammation that the brain cannot resolve when age-related dysfunction of the systemic immune system limits peripheral immune support. Preclinical studies using rodent models showed that transient systemic blockade of programmed death-ligand 1 is associated with reduced neuroinflammation, neuroprotection and attenuation of disease progression. Based on the underlying mechanism, a new short-lived anti-programmed death-ligand 1 antibody with Fc-effector silencing and reduced FcRn binding (IBC-Ab002) was engineered. Here, we report a randomized, double-blind, phase 1b first-in-human trial in early AD, with safety and tolerability as the primary endpoint. Forty participants were enrolled across five ascending dose cohorts (1-30 mg kg-1), with dosing administered four times at 3-month intervals. Treatment was well tolerated, with no treatment-related serious adverse events or evidence of amyloid-related imaging abnormalities. Exploratory analyses at week 48 showed directional changes in cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers of neuronal and synaptic damage favoring the 30 mg kg-1 dose, although no doses reached statistical significance given the limited sample size. The safety and tolerability profile supports further clinical development of systemic, intermittently administered IBC-Ab002 in early AD. ClinicalTrials.gov registration: NCT05551741 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Immunotherapy with a short-lived anti-PD-L1 antibody in Alzheimer's disease: a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 使用短效抗 PD-L1 抗体治疗阿尔茨海默病的免疫疗法：1b 期、随机、双盲试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 虽然阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是由淀粉样斑块积聚引发的，但其进展涉及局部神经炎症，当与年龄相关的全身免疫系统功能障碍限制外周免疫支持时，大脑无法解决这种炎症。使用啮齿动物模型进行的临床前研究表明，程序性死亡配体 1 的短暂全身阻断与神经炎症的减少、神经保护和疾病进展的减缓有关。基于潜在机制，设计了一种具有 Fc 效应子沉默和 FcRn 结合减少的新型短寿命抗程序性死亡配体 1 抗体 (IBC-Ab002)。在这里，我们报告了一项针对早期 AD 的随机、双盲、1b 期首次人体试验，以安全性和耐受性作为主要终点。 40 名参与者被纳入 5 个剂量递增队列（1-30 mg kg-1），每 3 个月给药 4 次。治疗耐受性良好，没有与治疗相关的严重不良事件或淀粉样蛋白相关成像异常的证据。第 48 周的探索性分析显示，神经元和突触损伤的脑脊液生物标志物发生方向性变化，有利于 30 mg kg-1 剂量，但考虑到样本量有限，没有任何剂量达到统计学显着性。安全性和耐受性概况支持在早期 AD 中系统性、间歇性给药 IBC-Ab002 的进一步临床开发。 ClinicalTrials.gov 注册：NCT05551741。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Alexander F Haddad; Rithvik Ramesh; Jorge Armando Peña Agudelo; Christopher Salha; Pranav Prakash; Shreya R Aghi; James S Trippett; Maria G Castro
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains a disease with high mortality despite treatment with maximal safe surgical resection, radiation, and temozolomide. Standard of care for GBM has remained unchanged for decades. Gene therapies using both viral and nonviral platforms have the potential to significantly improve outcomes but have faced challenges related to delivery, intratumoral heterogeneity, and immunologic limitations. OBSERVATIONS: This review discusses the most recent progress in genetic therapies for gliomas, with a focus on clinical platforms and those nearing clinical translation. Oncolytic and nonlytic replicating viral therapies remain the most clinically advanced, with adeno-associated virus and nonviral systems approaching clinical translation. Treatment efficacy has been variable across trials, platforms, and payloads. Oncolytic herpes simplex virus (G47Δ, teserpaturev) has been conditionally approved for the treatment of gliomas in Japan, while next-generation constructs show a potential association between immunologic activation and survival. Common challenges include the verification and quantification of delivery efficiency, the balance between antivector and antitumor immunity, appropriately designed clinical trials, relevant modeling of vector behavior in the preclinical setting, regulatory clearance, and manufacturing. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Understanding the potential and limitations of gene therapies for gliomas is vital in navigating the path forward for these promising therapies. The future of these treatments will focus on improved clinical trial design with rapid confirmation and tracking of delivery, biomarker feedback and assay optimization, and combination strategies. A focus on delivery platform development can compress iteration cycles and lead to therapeutic benefit for patients with gliomas and other solid tumors.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Recent Advances and Future Prospects in Gene Delivery Platforms for Glioblastoma: A Review.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤基因传递平台的最新进展和未来前景：综述。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：尽管采用最大程度安全的手术切除、放疗和替莫唑胺进行治疗，胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 仍然是一种死亡率较高的疾病。 GBM 的护理标准几十年来一直保持不变。使用病毒和非病毒平台的基因疗法有可能显着改善结果，但面临与递送、瘤内异质性和免疫学限制相关的挑战。观察：这篇综述讨论了神经胶质瘤基因治疗的最新进展，重点是临床平台和接近临床转化的平台。溶瘤和非裂解复制病毒疗法仍然是临床上最先进的，腺相关病毒和非病毒系统已接近临床转化。治疗效果因试验、平台和有效负载而异。溶瘤单纯疱疹病毒（G47Δ，teserpaturev）已在日本有条件批准用于治疗神经胶质瘤，而下一代构建体显示出免疫激活和生存之间的潜在关联。常见的挑战包括传递效率的验证和量化、抗载体和抗肿瘤免疫之间的平衡、适当设计的临床试验、临床前环境中载体行为的相关建模、监管许可和制造。结论和相关性：了解神经胶质瘤基因疗法的潜力和局限性对于探索这些有前途的疗法的前进道路至关重要。这些治疗的未来将侧重于改进临床试验设计，包括快速确认和跟踪给药、生物标志物反馈和测定优化以及组合策略。专注于交付平台开发可以压缩迭代周期，并为神经胶质瘤和其他实体瘤患者带来治疗益处。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Anti-LAG-3 with or without anti-PD-1 in recurrent glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Michael Lim; Xiaobu Ye; Anna F Piotrowski; Arati Desai; Manmeet S Ahluwalia; Tobias Walbert; Glenn Lesser; Benjamin M Ellingson
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Lymphocyte activation gene 3 (LAG-3) is an immune checkpoint implicated in T cell exhaustion and a potential therapeutic target in glioblastoma (GBM). We conducted a multicenter, open-label, phase 1 study with sequential allocation to evaluate the safety and preliminary activity of the anti-LAG-3 antibody relatlimab, administered alone or with the anti-programmed cell death protein 1 (PD-1) antibody nivolumab, in patients with recurrent GBM. Forty-six patients were treated (23 per cohort). The primary endpoint of safety was met, with maximum tolerated doses of 800 mg relatlimab for monotherapy and 160 mg relatlimab/240 mg nivolumab for combination therapy. Treatment-related grade 3-4 adverse events occurred in 6 of 23 patients receiving combination therapy and were not observed with monotherapy. Neoadjuvant administration was associated with increased intratumoral CD8+ T cell infiltration for both monotherapy and combination therapy. Exploratory analyses suggested that tumors with elevated baseline interferon signaling and increased T cell clonality were enriched among patients with durable responses to combination therapy. Twelve-month overall survival was 34.8% with relatlimab alone and 52.2% with combination therapy; however, this study was not designed to assess efficacy. These findings demonstrate an acceptable safety profile and provide preliminary immunologic and clinical signals supporting further evaluation of LAG-3 blockade in GBM. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT02658981 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Anti-LAG-3 with or without anti-PD-1 in recurrent glioblastoma: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 抗 LAG-3 联合或不联合抗 PD-1 治疗复发性胶质母细胞瘤：1 期试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 淋巴细胞激活基因 3 (LAG-3) 是一种与 T 细胞耗竭有关的免疫检查点，也是胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的潜在治疗靶点。我们进行了一项多中心、开放标签、序贯分配的 1 期研究，以评估抗 LAG-3 抗体 relatlimab 单独给药或与抗程序性细胞死亡蛋白 1 (PD-1) 抗体 nivolumab 联合给药在复发性 GBM 患者中的安全性和初步活性。 46 名患者接受了治疗（每组 23 名）。达到了安全性的主要终点，单药治疗的最大耐受剂量为 800 mg relatlimab，联合治疗的最大耐受剂量为 160 mg relatlimab/240 mg nivolumab。接受联合治疗的 23 名患者中有 6 名发生了与治疗相关的 3-4 级不良事件，而单药治疗中未观察到这种情况。无论是单一疗法还是联合疗法，新辅助给药均与瘤内 CD8+ T 细胞浸润增加相关。探索性分析表明，对联合治疗有持久反应的患者中，基线干扰素信号传导升高和 T 细胞克隆性增加的肿瘤较多。单独使用 relatlimab 的 12 个月总生存率为 34.8%，联合治疗的 12 个月总生存率为 52.2%；然而，这项研究并不是为了评估疗效。这些研究结果证明了可接受的安全性，并提供了初步的免疫学和临床信号，支持进一步评估 GBM 中的 LAG-3 阻断剂。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT02658981。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: G Paul; H Bjartmarz; A Kirkeby; J Nelander; R Smith; S Kayhanian; A Evans; B Harry
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is characterized by progressive loss of nigral dopaminergic neurons, resulting in disabling motor symptoms. Intracerebral transplantation of stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitors to replace lost endogenous dopaminergic neurons offers a new potentially restorative therapeutic approach for PD. Here we report the 12-month primary safety end point and interim efficacy outcomes from a phase 1/2, open-label, multicenter trial evaluating STEM-PD, a cryopreserved, off-the-shelf dopaminergic progenitor product derived from human pluripotent stem cells. Eight individuals with moderate PD underwent bilateral intraputaminal transplantation at two escalating doses (n = 4 per cohort), followed by 12 months of immunosuppression. Seven participants completed 12-month follow-up; one participant died from a pulmonary infection. No serious adverse events were attributed to the cell product, no graft-induced dyskinesias were observed and serial magnetic resonance imaging showed no evidence of tumor formation. These findings support the feasibility and favorable safety profile of human pluripotent stem cell-derived dopaminergic progenitor transplantation in this early-phase study, with risks primarily associated with the immunosuppression regimen. Ongoing follow-up to 36 months will further evaluate durability, clinical outcomes and graft function. ClinicalTrials.gov identifier: NCT05635409 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic cells for Parkinson's disease: a phase 1/2 open-label trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类胚胎干细胞衍生的多巴胺能细胞治疗帕金森病：1/2 期开放标签试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 帕金森病 (PD) 的特点是黑质多巴胺能神经元逐渐丧失，导致运动障碍症状。脑内移植干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞来替代丢失的内源性多巴胺能神经元，为帕金森病提供了一种新的潜在恢复治疗方法。在此，我们报告了一项 1/2 期、开放标签、多中心试验的 12 个月主要安全终点和中期疗效结果，该试验评估了 STEM-PD，这是一种源自人类多能干细胞的冷冻保存、现成的多巴胺能祖细胞产品。 8 名中度 PD 患者接受了两次递增剂量的双侧壳核内移植（每组 n = 4 例），然后接受 12 个月的免疫抑制。 7 名参与者完成了 12 个月的随访；一名参与者死于肺部感染。细胞产物没有引起严重的不良事件，没有观察到移植物引起的运动障碍，并且连续磁共振成像没有显示肿瘤形成的证据。这些发现支持了这项早期研究中人类多能干细胞衍生的多巴胺能祖细胞移植的可行性和良好的安全性，其风险主要与免疫抑制方案相关。持续随访 36 个月将进一步评估耐久性、临床结果和移植功能。 ClinicalTrials.gov 标识符：NCT05635409。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Cell-type signatures of Alzheimer's disease shared across population groups.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Tain Luquez; Jonathan Algoo; Rebecca Chiu; Jason A Mares; Archana Yadav; Matti Lam; Pallavi Gaur; Xiaoying Lai
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Genomic studies at single-cell resolution have identified several cell types associated with clinical and pathological traits in Alzheimer's disease1-9, but have not examined associations that are shared across populations. To bridge this gap, here we use single-nucleus RNA sequencing and assay for transposase-accessible chromatin with sequencing to profile cortical and subcortical regions in post-mortem brain-tissue samples from Latin, white (excluding Latin) and African American (excluding Latin) individuals. Using discrete and continuous dissections of molecular programs, we identify cell-type-specific clusters associated with Alzheimer's disease in a region-specific manner across all three population groups, including microglial (GPNMB+ and CD74+ subgroups), astrocytic (SERPINH1+, CD44+ and WIF1+ subgroups) and neuronal (SST+ GABAergic and superficial-layer glutamatergic) signatures. We also report continuous gene-expression factors in astrocytes and oligodendrocytes that are not captured by discrete cluster assignments, but which show strong associations with disease phenotypes; these factors are enriched for genes associated with annotated functions such as lipid processing and neurotransmitter reuptake. Finally, we find that molecular programs reveal six distinct subgroups of individuals with cognitive impairment that span all three populations, are not captured by neuropathology, and are instead distinguished by molecular signatures that are not universally present but are nonetheless associated with ante-mortem impairment. Overall, our study identifies key cell types and gene programs implicated in Alzheimer's disease that are shared across population groups, and underscores how representative sampling can capture both shared signatures and disease heterogeneity, thereby enabling better prioritization of key cell types for further investigation.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Cell-type signatures of Alzheimer's disease shared across population groups.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 阿尔茨海默病的细胞类型特征在不同人群中是相同的。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 单细胞分辨率的基因组研究已经确定了与阿尔茨海默病临床和病理特征相关的几种细胞类型1-9，但尚未检查人群之间共有的关联。为了弥补这一差距，我们在这里使用单核 RNA 测序和转座酶可及染色质分析来分析拉丁裔、白人（不包括拉丁裔）和非裔美国人（不包括拉丁裔）个体死后脑组织样本中的皮质和皮质下区域。通过对分子程序的离散和连续剖析，我们以区域特异性方式在所有三个人群中识别出与阿尔茨海默病相关的细胞类型特异性簇，包括小胶质细胞（GPNMB+和CD74+亚组）、星形细胞（SERPINH1+、CD44+和WIF1+亚组）和神经元（SST+GABA能和浅层谷氨酸能）特征。我们还报告了星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞中的连续基因表达因子，这些因子未被离散的聚类分配捕获，但显示出与疾病表型的强烈关联；这些因子富含与注释功能相关的基因，例如脂质加工和神经递质再摄取。最后，我们发现分子程序揭示了跨越所有三个人群的六个不同的认知障碍个体亚组，这些亚组并未被神经病理学捕获，而是通过分子特征来区分，这些分子特征并不普遍存在，但仍然与生前损伤相关。总体而言，我们的研究确定了与阿尔茨海默病相关的关键细胞类型和基因程序，这些细胞类型和基因程序在不同人群中共享，并强调代表性抽样如何能够捕获共享特征和疾病异质性，从而能够更好地优先考虑关键细胞类型以进行进一步研究。

核心发现：单细胞分辨率的基因组研究已经确定了与阿尔茨海默病临床和病理特征相关的几种细胞类型1-9，但尚未检查人群之间共有的关联。为了弥补这一差距，我们在这里使用单核 RNA 测序和转座酶可及染色质分析来分析拉丁裔、白人（不包括拉丁裔）和非裔美国人（不包括拉丁裔）个体死后脑组织样本中的皮质和皮质下区域。通过对分子程序的离散和连续剖析，我们以区域特异性方式在所有三个人群中识别出与阿尔茨海默病相关的细胞类型特异性簇，包括小胶质细胞（GPNMB+和CD74+亚组）、星形细胞（SERPINH1+、CD44+和WIF1+亚组）和神经元（SST+GABA能和浅层谷氨酸能）特征。我们还报告了星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞中的连续基因表达因子，这些因子未被离散的聚类分配捕获，但显示出与疾病表型的强烈关联；这些因子富含与注释功能相关的基因，例如脂质加工和神经递质再摄取。最后，我们发现分子程序揭示了跨越所有三个人群的六个不同的认知障碍个体亚组，这些亚组并未被神经病理学捕获，而是通过分子特征来区分，这些分子特征并不普遍存在，但仍然与生前损伤相关。总体而言，我们的研究确定了与阿尔茨海默病相关的关键细胞类型和基因程序，这些细胞类型和基因程序在不同人群中共享，并强调代表性抽样如何能够捕获共享特征和疾病异质性，从而能够更好地优先考虑关键细胞类型以进行进一步研究。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Cross-cohort analysis of expression and splicing quantitative trait loci in TOPMed.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Peter Orchard; Thomas W Blackwell; Linda Kachuri; Peter J Castaldi; Michael H Cho; Stephanie A Christenson; Peter Durda; Stacey Gabriel
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Most genetic variants associated with complex traits are hypothesized to regulate gene expression. To understand the genetics underlying gene expression variability, we characterized 14,324 RNA-sequencing samples from the Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine program and performed expression and splicing quantitative trait locus (e/sQTL) analyses in six tissues and cell types, including whole blood (n = 6454) and lung (n = 1291). We detected tens of thousands of secondary cis-e/sQTLs, showing that secondary cis-e/sQTL discovery remains unsaturated. We fine-mapped UK Biobank-derived genome-wide association study (GWAS) signals from 164 traits and identified e/sQTL colocalizations for 10,611 GWAS signals, including 7096 that colocalize with secondary e/sQTLs. Our results suggest that even larger e/sQTL analyses will uncover additional secondary e/sQTLs, further benefiting GWAS interpretation.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Cross-cohort analysis of expression and splicing quantitative trait loci in TOPMed.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: TOPMed 中表达和剪接数量性状位点的跨队列分析。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 大多数与复杂性状相关的遗传变异被假设为调节基因表达。为了了解基因表达变异性背后的遗传学原理，我们对来自 Trans-Omics for Precision Medicine 项目的 14,324 个 RNA 测序样本进行了表征，并在六种组织和细胞类型中进行了表达和剪接数量性状位点 (e/sQTL) 分析，包括全血 (n = 6454) 和肺 (n = 1291)。我们检测到了数以万计的次级 cis-e/sQTL，表明次级 cis-e/sQTL 的发现仍然不饱和。我们对来自英国生物银行的 164 个性状的全基因组关联研究 (GWAS) 信号进行了精细绘图，并确定了 10,611 个 GWAS 信号的 e/sQTL 共定位，其中包括 7096 个与次级 e/sQTL 共定位的信号。我们的结果表明，更大规模的 e/sQTL 分析将发现更多的次级 e/sQTL，进一步有利于 GWAS 解释。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Oligonucleotide-siRNA conjugate for SOD1 amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Weiqi Chen; Lingling Jiang; Chunling Duan; Moorim Kang; Jinyi Ye; Ling Wang; Yuesong Pan; Hui Qu
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) is a fatal neurodegenerative disease partly caused by gain-of-function mutations in superoxide dismutase 1 (SOD1). Here we developed RAG-17, an siRNA-targeting SOD1, using an accessory oligonucleotide conjugate platform for enhanced central nervous system (CNS) delivery. Preclinically, RAG-17 rescued motor neuron degeneration, delayed disease progression, preserved motor function and extended survival in SOD1G93A ALS rodents, even with advanced-stage treatment. In cynomolgus monkeys, intrathecal RAG-17 led to dose-dependent, durable reductions in SOD1 mRNA (CNS) and protein (cerebrospinal fluid (CSF)). In a first-in-human trial in patients with SOD1-ALS (n = 6), participants were assigned to two cohorts-cohort 1 (n = 3) received an initial 60 mg dose (seven doses total) and cohort 2 (n = 3) received an initial 90 mg dose (six doses total). The dose was escalated in 30 mg steps to maintenance doses of 150 mg (n = 5) or 180 mg (n = 1). Thus, the primary safety endpoint was met, showing acceptable safety and tolerability. Treatment-emergent adverse events (TEAEs) occurred in 33% of participants (two of six). All TEAEs were mild to moderate, including muscle tremor (two patients) and elevated alanine aminotransferase (one patient), all of which resolved. No serious adverse events were reported. Furthermore, no other clinically meaningful changes were observed in laboratory parameters, vital signs, the ALS Functional Rating Scale-Revised score, physical or neurological examinations or ECG. The key secondary endpoints showed CSF SOD1 reductions of 69% (cohort 1, day 240) and 56% (cohort 2, day 210), and plasma neurofilament light chain reductions of 62% (cohort 1) and 52% (cohort 2), from baseline; no patient required invasive mechanical ventilation or died by the end of the study. These results demonstrate a favorable safety outcome, supporting the continued clinical evaluation of RAG-17 for SOD1-ALS. ClinicalTrials.gov registration: NCT05903690 .
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Oligonucleotide-siRNA conjugate for SOD1 amyotrophic lateral sclerosis: a phase 1 trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 用于 SOD1 肌萎缩侧索硬化症的寡核苷酸-siRNA 缀合物：1 期试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 肌萎缩侧索硬化症 (ALS) 是一种致命的神经退行性疾病，部分原因是超氧化物歧化酶 1 (SOD1) 的功能获得性突变。在这里，我们开发了 RAG-17，一种 siRNA 靶向 SOD1，使用辅助寡核苷酸缀合物平台来增强中枢神经系统 (CNS) 递送。临床前，RAG-17 可以挽救 SOD1G93A ALS 啮齿动物的运动神经元变性、延缓疾病进展、保留运动功能并延长生存期，即使进行了晚期治疗也是如此。在食蟹猴中，鞘内注射 RAG-17 导致 SOD1 mRNA (CNS) 和蛋白质（脑脊液 (CSF)）的剂量依赖性、持久减少。在一项针对 SOD1-ALS 患者 (n = 6) 的首次人体试验中，参与者被分配到两个队列：队列 1 (n = 3) 接受初始 60 mg 剂量（总共 7 剂），队列 2 (n = 3) 接受初始 90 mg 剂量（总共 6 剂）。剂量以 30 mg 为增量递增至 150 mg (n = 5) 或 180 mg (n = 1) 的维持剂量。因此，达到了主要安全终点，显示出可接受的安全性和耐受性。 33% 的参与者（六分之二）发生了治疗引起的不良事件 (TEAE)。所有 TEAE 均为轻度至中度，包括肌肉震颤（两名患者）和丙氨酸转氨酶升高（一名患者），但均已得到缓解。没有报告严重不良事件。此外，在实验室参数、生命体征、ALS 功能评定量表修订版评分、体格或神经学检查或心电图方面没有观察到其他有临床意义的变化。关键的次要终点显示，与基线相比，脑脊液 SOD1 减少了 69%（队列 1，第 240 天）和 56%（队列 2，第 210 天），血浆神经丝轻链减少了 62%（队列 1）和 52%（队列 2）；到研究结束时，没有患者需要有创机械通气或死亡。这些结果证明了良好的安全性结果，支持 RAG-17 对 SOD1-ALS 的持续临床评估。 ClinicalTrials.gov 注册：NCT05903690。

global_hot_topics.title: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yunchang Yang; XiangXiang Cao; Nan Feng; Xinyao Kang; Yaofeng Wang; Yunqin Sun
global_hot_topics.abstract: Glioblastoma (GBM) is defined by extreme lethality and transcriptomic plasticity, but the signatures driving the most aggressive tumors remain incompletely defined. In this exploratory in silico study, TCGA-GBM patients were stratified using a strict 1-year overall survival threshold. We integrated differential expression analysis, WGCNA, single-cell RNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, and virtual knockout simulations. A high-risk signature centered on CCL2 and TIMP1 was identified. Single-cell and spatial mapping linked these genes to an inflammatory, macrophage-enriched microenvironment. The signature inversely correlated with neuronal synapse mimicry scores, suggesting that extreme aggressiveness involves a macroscopic shift from differentiated neuronal states toward an undifferentiated inflammatory phenotype. Virtual perturbation modeling confirmed CCL2 and TIMP1 as highly interconnected network hubs. Despite limitations inherent to computational and retrospective cohorts, our rigorous multi-omics validation identifies the CCL2/TIMP1 axis as a driver of potential prognostic indicator. These findings generate the hypothesis that these mediators reflect a critical inflammatory, mesenchymal-like tumor microenvironment shift, warranting independent cohort validation and experimental investigation.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Exploratory multi-omics links CCL2/TIMP1 axis to immunosuppressive TME in glioblastoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 探索性多组学将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴与胶质母细胞瘤中的免疫抑制 TME 联系起来。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 的定义是极高的致死率和转录组可塑性，但驱动最具侵袭性肿瘤的特征仍未完全确定。在这项探索性计算机研究中，TCGA-GBM 患者使用严格的 1 年总生存阈值进行分层。我们集成了差异表达分析、WGCNA、单细胞 RNA-seq、空间转录组学和虚拟敲除模拟。确定了以 CCL2 和 TIMP1 为中心的高风险特征。单细胞和空间图谱将这些基因与富含巨噬细胞的炎症微环境联系起来。该特征与神经元突触拟态评分呈负相关，表明极端攻击性涉及从分化的神经元状态向未分化的炎症表型的宏观转变。虚拟扰动模型证实 CCL2 和 TIMP1 是高度互连的网络中心。尽管计算和回顾性队列存在固有的局限性，但我们严格的多组学验证将 CCL2/TIMP1 轴确定为潜在预后指标的驱动因素。这些发现产生了这样的假设：这些介质反映了关键的炎症性、间质样肿瘤微环境的转变，需要独立的队列验证和实验研究。

global_hot_topics.title: Relation between voxel-based specific regional analysis system for Alzheimer's disease (VSRAD) on 3-tesla MRI and cognitive performances: Practical application in clinical settings.
global_hot_topics.authors: K Igase; M Igase; H Matsuda; J Hara; J R Bock; K Sadamoto; W R Shankle
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Voxel-based specific regional analysis system for Alzheimer's disease (VSRAD) software using MRI scanner allows quantification of hippocampal and parahippocampal atrophy in the medial temporal structures by Z-score, and this score is widely used in clinical Alzheimer's disease (AD) diagnosis. However, it is unclear whether the Z-score is useful to discriminate normal aging from cognitive impairment (CI) or mild cognitive impairment (MCI). The present study examined the associations between VSRAD Z-score and cognitive performance quantified by Memory Performance Index (MPI) and determined a Z-score cut-off value. METHOD: Three-tesla brain MRI was conducted in 100 outpatients without dementia, and all MRI data were analyzed using VSRAD. The target region of interest (ROI) mainly consisted of the para hippocampal gyrus. The degree of atrophy in the ROI was obtained from the averaged positive Z-score of the ROI. Cognitive performance was evaluated with the Japanese version of the MCI screen (MCIS). Patients were classified into normal (NL) and below normal (BNL) cognitive groups by MPI. The relation between MPI and VSRAD Z-score were assessed with logistic regression analysis, and the cut-off value for Z-score was determined by receiver operating characteristic curve analysis. RESULTS: Sixty-two percent (62%) were identified as the BNL group by MPI. Univariate analyses found that the BNL group had a significantly higher age, shorter years of education, and higher Z-score in VSRAD compared to the NL group, but no statistically significant difference was observed between genders. Bivariate correlation found that MPI, which is adjusted for age, gender, and years of education, was significantly correlated with Z-score assessed by VSRAD (Pearson's r = -0.52, p < .001). A subsequent logistic regression of VSRAD Z-score on BNL classification was used to generate a receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC = 0.75). The Youden index was applied to identify a cut-off value of VSRAD Z-score of 1.14 (sensitivity = 62.9%; specificity = 84.2%) to classify MPI < 50.2 (BNL) with overall accuracy of 73.5%. CONCLUSIONS: VSRAD Z-score using VSRAD software was one independent factor significantly associated with cognitive performance measured by MPI. The determination of a cut-off value for Z-score (1.14) that can help discriminate normal patients from those with MCI.

global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：使用MRI扫描仪的基于体素的阿尔茨海默病特定区域分析系统（VSRAD）软件可以通过Z评分对内侧颞叶结构中的海马和海马旁萎缩进行量化，该评分广泛应用于临床阿尔茨海默病（AD）诊断。然而，尚不清楚 Z 分数是否有助于区分正常衰老与认知障碍 (CI) 或轻度认知障碍 (MCI)。本研究检查了 VSRAD Z 分数与通过记忆表现指数 (MPI) 量化的认知表现之间的关联，并确定了 Z 分数截止值。方法：对100例门诊无痴呆患者进行三特斯拉脑部MRI检查，所有MRI数据均采用VSRAD进行分析。目标感兴趣区域（ROI）主要由海马旁回组成。 ROI 的萎缩程度是从 ROI 的平均正 Z 分数获得的。认知表现通过日本版 MCI 屏幕（MCIS）进行评估。根据 MPI 将患者分为正常（NL）和低于正常（BNL）认知组。通过逻辑回归分析评估MPI和VSRAD Z评分之间的关​​系，并通过受试者工作特征曲线分析确定Z评分的截止值。结果：62% (62%) 被 MPI 识别为 BNL 组。单变量分析发现，与NL组相比，BNL组的年龄显着较高，受教育年限较短，VSRAD Z得分较高，但性别之间没有观察到统计学上的显着差异。双变量相关性发现，根据年龄、性别和受教育年限进行调整后的 MPI 与 VSRAD 评估的 Z 分数显着相关（Pearson's r = -0.52，p < .001）。随后使用 BNL 分类上的 VSRAD Z 分数的逻辑回归来生成受试者工作特征曲线 (AUC = 0.75)。应用 Youden 指数确定 VSRAD Z 分数的截止值为 1.14（敏感性 = 62.9%；特异性 = 84.2%），以对 MPI < 50.2 (BNL) 进行分类，总体准确度为 73.5%。结论：使用 VSRAD 软件的 VSRAD Z 分数是一项独立的……

global_hot_topics.title: A novel deep learning approach for privacy-preserving encoded EEG-based brain-computer interfaces with clinical LLM applications.
global_hot_topics.authors: Taslima Khanam; Siuly Siuly; Kate Wang; Hua Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: PURPOSE: The rise of large language models (LLMs) such as GPT-4 and DeepSeek has transformed healthcare information processing by enabling natural language-based clinical reasoning. However, the integration of LLMs with privacy-sensitive biomedical signals, particularly electroencephalogram (EEG) data used in brain-computer interface (BCI) systems, remains underexplored. EEG signals, especially during motor imagery (MI) tasks, are critical for assistive neurotechnologies but pose significant privacy risks due to their capacity to reveal cognitive and medical information. Traditional encryption techniques often distort signal structure or require decryption with additional noise, compromising classification performance and real-time usability. METHODS: To address this gap, we propose a deep denoising structure-preserving neural encoding network (DSNet) that enables accurate classification of privacy-preserving encoded EEG representations without requiring decryption. EEG features were extracted using common spatial pattern (CSP) and transformed into privacy-preserving encoded representations while preserving their statistical structure. Here, encoding refers to a non-reversible neural transformation designed for privacy preservation rather than a formal cryptographic guarantee. Two deep learning architectures, a feedforward neural network (NN) and a recurrent neural network (RNN), were evaluated for classification in the encoded feature space. Furthermore, we integrated an LLM (GPT-4) to generate clinical-style summaries based on model outputs, enhancing interpretability for clinician review and potential clinical support use. RESULTS AND CONCLUSION: Using publicly available datasets, DSNet-NN achieved over 87% accuracy for every subject, outperforming both the RNN variant and baseline models. It also demonstrated resilience to simulated privacy attacks. LLM-generated reports provided clinician-friendly interpretations of MI predictions, supporting potential real-world applicability. This study introduces an AI framework that bridges privacy-preserving EEG decoding with LLM-based clinical reasoning, offering a practical solution for privacy-preserving neurorehabilitation and digital health systems.

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于隐私保护编码的基于脑电图的脑机接口与临床法学硕士应用程序。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：GPT-4 和 DeepSeek 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起通过实现基于自然语言的临床推理，改变了医疗保健信息处理。然而，法学硕士与隐私敏感的生物医学信号的整合，特别是脑机接口（BCI）系统中使用的脑电图（EEG）数据的整合仍有待探索。脑电图信号，尤其是在运动想象 (MI) 任务期间，对于辅助神经技术至关重要，但由于其揭示认知和医疗信息的能力，会带来重大的隐私风险。传统的加密技术通常会扭曲信号结构或需要使用额外噪声进行解密，从而损害分类性能和实时可用性。方法：为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种深度去噪结构保留神经编码网络（DSNet），它能够对隐私保护编码脑电图表示进行准确分类，而无需解密。使用通用空间模式（CSP）提取脑电图特征，并将其转换为保护隐私的编码表示，同时保留其统计结构。这里，编码是指为隐私保护而设计的不可逆神经变换，而不是正式的密码学保证。评估了两种深度学习架构，即前馈神经网络 (NN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)，以在编码特征空间中进行分类。此外，我们集成了法学硕士 (GPT-4)，以根据模型输出生成临床风格的摘要，从而增强临床医生审查和潜在临床支持用途的可解释性。结果和结论：使用公开可用的数据集，DSNet-NN 对每个受试者的准确率都超过 87%，优于 RNN 变体模型和基线模型。它还表现出了对模拟隐私攻击的抵御能力。法学硕士生成的报告为 MI 预测提供了临床医生友好的解释，支持潜在的现实应用性。本研究引入了一种人工智能框架，将保护隐私的脑电图解码与基于法学硕士的临床推理联系起来，为保护隐私的神经康复提供了实用的解决方案……

核心发现：目的：GPT-4 和 DeepSeek 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 的兴起通过实现基于自然语言的临床推理，改变了医疗保健信息处理。然而，法学硕士与隐私敏感的生物医学信号的整合，特别是脑机接口（BCI）系统中使用的脑电图（EEG）数据的整合仍有待探索。脑电图信号，尤其是在运动想象 (MI) 任务期间，对于辅助神经技术至关重要，但由于其揭示认知和医疗信息的能力，会带来重大的隐私风险。传统的加密技术通常会扭曲信号结构或需要使用额外噪声进行解密，从而损害分类性能和实时可用性。方法：为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种深度去噪结构保留神经编码网络（DSNet），它能够对隐私保护编码脑电图表示进行准确分类，而无需解密。使用通用空间模式（CSP）提取脑电图特征，并将其转换为保护隐私的编码表示，同时保留其统计结构。这里，编码是指为隐私保护而设计的不可逆神经变换，而不是正式的密码学保证。评估了两种深度学习架构，即前馈神经网络 (NN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN)，以在编码特征空间中进行分类。此外，我们集成了法学硕士 (GPT-4)，以根据模型输出生成临床风格的摘要，从而增强临床医生审查和潜在临床支持用途的可解释性。结果和结论：使用公开可用的数据集，DSNet-NN 对每个受试者的准确率都超过 87%，优于 RNN 变体模型和基线模型。它还表现出了对模拟隐私攻击的抵御能力。法学硕士生成的报告为 MI 预测提供了临床医生友好的解释，支持潜在的现实应用性。本研究引入了一种人工智能框架，将保护隐私的脑电图解码与基于法学硕士的临床推理联系起来，为保护隐私的神经康复提供了实用的解决方案……

global_hot_topics.title: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kawasaki disease (KD) is a systemic vasculitis in children primarily affecting the coronary arteries, and studies suggest that the gut microbiota may be involved in KD pathogenesis, inflammatory responses, and immune regulation. This study employed an integrative multi-omics strategy to systematically investigate gut microbiota-metabolite interactions in KD. Key molecular targets were identified using network-based analyses and machine learning models, with Mendelian randomization providing causal validation. Single-cell transcriptomics and molecular docking further elucidated immune cell interactions and metabolite-protein binding, highlighting critical regulatory pathways. We identified SELP as a core molecular target in KD, predominantly expressed in platelets and involved in immune and inflammatory responses. Gut microbiota-derived metabolites, including palmitoylethanolamide, pantothenic acid, and 1-O-caffeoylglycerol, may regulate immune cell interactions via the RESISTIN signalling pathway. Altered abundances of microbial taxa such as Bacteroides, Parabacteroides, and Bifidobacterium suggest their potential role in inflammation modulation. Activation of IL-17, TNF, MAPK, and PI3K-Akt pathways further contributes to disease progression, highlighting the microbiota-metabolite-SELP axis as a potential therapeutic target in KD. These findings lay the groundwork for subsequent in vitro and in vivo studies, advancing the development of microbiome-based intervention strategies.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Immune regulatory mechanisms and potential microbiota-associated targets in Kawasaki disease: an integrative multi-omics and network pharmacology study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 川崎病的免疫调节机制和潜在的微生物相关靶标：一项综合多组学和网络药理学研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 川崎病 (KD) 是一种主要影响冠状动脉的儿童系统性血管炎，研究表明肠道微生物群可能参与 KD 发病机制、炎症反应和免疫调节。本研究采用综合多组学策略来系统地研究川崎病中肠道微生物群与代谢物的相互作用。使用基于网络的分析和机器学习模型确定了关键分子靶点，并通过孟德尔随机化提供因果验证。单细胞转录组学和分子对接进一步阐明了免疫细胞相互作用和代谢物-蛋白质结合，突出了关键的调控途径。我们将 SELP 确定为 KD 的核心分子靶点，主要在血小板中表达并参与免疫和炎症反应。肠道微生物群衍生的代谢物，包括棕榈酰乙醇酰胺、泛酸和 1-O-咖啡酰甘油，可能通过 RESISTIN 信号通路调节免疫细胞相互作用。拟杆菌属、副拟杆菌属和双歧杆菌等微生物类群丰度的改变表明它们在炎症调节中的潜在作用。 IL-17、TNF、MAPK 和 PI3K-Akt 通路的激活进一步促进疾病进展，凸显微生物群-代谢物-SELP 轴作为 KD 的潜在治疗靶点。这些发现为后续的体外和体内研究奠定了基础，推动了基于微生物组的干预策略的发展。

global_hot_topics.title: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.authors: Gonglin Tang; Fei Liu; Mingze Sun; Chenyue Liu; Jitao Wu; Hongwei Zhao
global_hot_topics.abstract: Kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC) features an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME). We investigated the role of transcription factor POU2F2 in KIRC oncogenesis and macrophage polarization. Single-cell and spatial transcriptomics showed that POU2F2 is upregulated in KIRC and associated with metastasis and poor prognosis. POU2F2 knockdown inhibited KIRC cell proliferation, migration, and invasion in vitro. POU2F2 expression correlated with macrophage infiltration and JAK-STAT signaling. Co-culture assays showed that POU2F2 silencing reduced macrophage recruitment and shifted M2 polarization toward an anti-tumor M1 phenotype. Overall, POU2F2 acts as an oncogenic driver and prognostic biomarker in KIRC, promoting an immunosuppressive TME and representing a potential therapeutic target.
global_hot_topics.title_en: POU2F2 as a dual oncogenic and immunomodulatory driver in kidney renal clear cell carcinoma.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: POU2F2 作为肾透明细胞癌的双重致癌和免疫调节驱动因素。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肾透明细胞癌 (KIRC) 具有免疫抑制肿瘤微环境 (TME)。我们研究了转录因子 POU2F2 在 KIRC 肿瘤发生和巨噬细胞极化中的作用。单细胞和空间转录组学表明 POU2F2 在 KIRC 中表达上调，并与转移和不良预后相关。 POU2F2 敲低可抑制 KIRC 细胞的体外增殖、迁移和侵袭。 POU2F2 表达与巨噬细胞浸润和 JAK-STAT 信号传导相关。共培养测定表明，POU2F2 沉默减少了巨噬细胞的招募，并将 M2 极化转向抗肿瘤 M1 表型。总体而言，POU2F2 在 KIRC 中充当致癌驱动因素和预后生物标志物，促进免疫抑制性 TME 并代表潜在的治疗靶点。

global_hot_topics.title: Ecological restructuring of the nonbacterial fecal microbiome in obesity across human cohorts.
global_hot_topics.authors: Laura Gallardo-Nuell; Marisel Rosell-Díaz; Josep Garre-Olmo; Josep Puig; Rafael Ramos; Javier Pons; Vicente Pérez-Brocal; Andrés Moya
global_hot_topics.abstract: Obesity is a complex metabolic disorder increasingly linked to alterations in the gut microbiome. While most research has focused on bacterial communities, the contribution of nonbacterial components including viruses, archaea, and eukaryotic microorganisms remains insufficiently characterized. Here, we performed a multicohort analysis to investigate the role of the nonbacterial gut microbiome in obesity across three independent human cohorts. Using compositional analyses adjusted for key covariates and network based approaches, we identified consistent multikingdom alterations associated with obesity. Individuals without obesity showed a reproducible enrichment of methanogenic archaea, particularly Methanobrevibacter smithii and Methanobrevibacter millerae, whereas individuals with obesity were characterized by increased abundance of bacteriophages from the class Caudoviricetes. In an elderly cohort, eukaryotic taxa such as Blastocystis spp. were additionally associated with the without obesity group. These patterns were largely consistent across cohorts and robust to sex stratification. Beyond taxonomic differences, ecological network analyses revealed substantial reorganization of microbial interactions in obesity. The identity and composition of hub taxa differed significantly between obesity and without obesity networks across all cohorts, indicating a shift in the taxa occupying central ecological roles. Notably, these differences were observed even when similar microbial kingdoms were represented, underscoring the importance of species-level resolution. Collectively, our findings demonstrate that obesity is associated with coordinated compositional and ecological alterations across the nonbacterial gut microbiome. This multikingdom perspective expands current understanding of microbiome dysbiosis in metabolic disease and highlights the archaeome and virome as potential contributors to host metabolic health.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Ecological restructuring of the nonbacterial fecal microbiome in obesity across human cohorts.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 人类肥胖人群中非细菌粪便微生物组的生态重建。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 肥胖是一种复杂的代谢紊乱，与肠道微生物组的改变越来越相关。虽然大多数研究都集中在细菌群落上，但包括病毒、古细菌和真核微生物在内的非细菌成分的贡献仍然没有得到充分的表征。在这里，我们进行了多队列分析，以研究非细菌肠道微生物组在三个独立人类队列中肥胖中的作用。使用针对关键协变量和基于网络的方法进行调整的成分分析，我们确定了与肥胖相关的一致的多界改变。不肥胖的个体表现出产甲烷古菌的可重复富集，特别是史密斯甲烷短杆菌和米勒甲烷短杆菌，而肥胖个体的特征是来自有尾病毒纲的噬菌体丰度增加。在老年群体中，真核生物类群如芽囊藻属。还与非肥胖组相关。这些模式在各个队列中基本一致，并且对性别分层具有很强的稳健性。除了分类学差异之外，生态网络分析还揭示了肥胖中微生物相互作用的实质性重组。在所有群体中，肥胖网络和无肥胖网络之间的中心类群的身份和组成存在显着差异，表明占据核心生态角色的类群发生了变化。值得注意的是，即使代表相似的微生物界，也观察到这些差异，这强调了物种水平分辨率的重要性。总的来说，我们的研究结果表明，肥胖与非细菌肠道微生物组的协调组成和生态改变有关。这种多界视角扩展了目前对代谢疾病中微生物组失调的理解，并强调古细菌组和病毒组是宿主代谢健康的潜在贡献者。

英文题目：Ecological restructuring of the nonbacterial fecal microbiome in obesity across human cohorts.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：肥胖是一种复杂的代谢紊乱，与肠道微生物组的改变越来越相关。虽然大多数研究都集中在细菌群落上，但包括病毒、古细菌和真核微生物在内的非细菌成分的贡献仍然没有得到充分的表征。在这里，我们进行了多队列分析，以研究非细菌肠道微生物组在三个独立人类队列中肥胖中的作用。使用针对关键协变量和基于网络的方法进行调整的成分分析，我们确定了与肥胖相关的一致的多界改变。不肥胖的个体表现出产甲烷古菌的可重复富集，特别是史密斯甲烷短杆菌和米勒甲烷短杆菌，而肥胖个体的特征是来自有尾病毒纲的噬菌体丰度增加。在老年群体中，真核生物类群如芽囊藻属。还与非肥胖组相关。这些模式在各个队列中基本一致，并且对性别分层具有很强的稳健性。除了分类学差异之外，生态网络分析还揭示了肥胖中微生物相互作用的实质性重组。在所有群体中，肥胖网络和无肥胖网络之间的中心类群的身份和组成存在显着差异，表明占据核心生态角色的类群发生了变化。值得注意的是，即使代表相似的微生物界，也观察到这些差异，这强调了物种水平分辨率的重要性。总的来说，我们的研究结果表明，肥胖与非细菌肠道微生物组的协调组成和生态改变有关。这种多界视角扩展了目前对代谢疾病中微生物组失调的理解，并强调古细菌组和病毒组是宿主代谢健康的潜在贡献者。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

小满点评：这是一条需要人工复核全文的候选文献，当前摘要层面不宜过度外推。

global_hot_topics.title: Longitudinal modelling of microbiome subcommunities reveals parity-dependent dynamics during pregnancy and postpartum.
global_hot_topics.authors: K M Kennedy; S Fernando; S A Atkinson; M G Surette; P Jeganathan; D M Sloboda
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Dysregulation of maternal adaptations to pregnancy due to high pre-pregnancy BMI (pBMI) is associated with worsened health outcomes for mothers and children. The role of the gut microbiome in these adaptations remains unclear. METHODS: Stool samples were collected from pregnant participants (n = 52) enrolled in the Be Healthy in Pregnancy study (NCT01689961) during first, second, and third trimesters, and 6-months postpartum, along with samples from their infants at 6 months of age. Following 16S rRNA gene sequencing, we implemented time-aligned LDA (TALDA) using a time-weighted sampling strategy with exponentially decaying weights to construct time-proximal cohorts, applied LDA to each cohort independently, and aligned resulting topics using the alto R package. Infant samples were analyzed using standard LDA. RESULTS: Seven distinct subcommunities were identified, one of which represented perineal contamination and was excluded from further analysis. Remaining subcommunities had distinct taxonomic definitions which remained stable throughout pregnancy (mean cross-cohort stability 0.899) while subcommunity proportions within individuals varied. Multiparous individuals showed greater shifts in subcommunity proportions during early pregnancy, while primiparous individuals displayed progressively increasing shifts with the largest changes during the transition from pregnancy to postpartum. High pBMI was associated with reduced microbiome remodelling, particularly among multiparous individuals. In exploratory analyses, maternal SCFA-producing subcommunity abundance at late pregnancy was positively associated with infant Bifidobacterium-dominated subcommunity proportions at 6 months, while pBMI > 25 was independently associated with lower infant Bifidobacterium. CONCLUSION: TALDA effectively distinguished between stable subcommunity definitions and dynamic subcommunity proportions, revealing that the microbiome maintains functional organization while subcommunity proportional contributions shift over the course of pregnancy and postpartum. These maternal dynamics may have intergenerational consequences through their influence on infant gut colonization. This work demonstrates that maternal factors modify microbiome trajectories and supports the existence of an ecological memory of pregnancy history within the maternal gut microbiome.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Longitudinal modelling of microbiome subcommunities reveals parity-dependent dynamics during pregnancy and postpartum.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 微生物组亚群的纵向模型揭示了妊娠和产后期间胎次依赖性动态。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：由于孕前体重指数（pBMI）较高，母亲对妊娠的适应失调与母亲和儿童的健康状况恶化有关。肠道微生物组在这些适应中的作用仍不清楚。方法：从参加 Be Healthy in Pregnancy 研究 (NCT01689961) 的怀孕参与者 (n = 52) 的妊娠早期、中期和晚期以及产后 6 个月期间采集粪便样本，并采集其 6 个月大婴儿的样本。在 16S rRNA 基因测序之后，我们使用具有指数衰减权重的时间加权采样策略来实现时间对齐 LDA (TALDA)，以构建近时间队列，将 LDA 独立应用于每个队列，并使用 alto R 包对齐结果主题。使用标准 LDA 分析婴儿样本。结果：确定了七个不同的亚群，其中一个代表会阴污染，被排除在进一步分析之外。其余的亚群落具有不同的分类学定义，在整个怀孕期间保持稳定（平均跨队列稳定性 0.899），而个体内的亚群落比例有所不同。经产个体在妊娠早期表现出较大的亚群落比例变化，而初产个体则表现出逐渐增加的变化，其中在从怀孕到产后的过渡期间变化最大。高 pBMI 与微生物组重塑减少相关，尤其是在经产个体中。在探索性分析中，妊娠晚期母体产生 SCFA 的亚群丰度与 6 个月时婴儿双歧杆菌占主导地位的亚群比例呈正相关，而 pBMI > 25 与婴儿双歧杆菌较低水平独立相关。结论：TALDA 有效区分了稳定亚群定义和动态亚群比例，揭示了微生物组维持功能组织，而亚群比例贡献在怀孕和产后过程中发生变化。这些母体动态可能通过影响婴儿肠道定植而产生代际后果。时间……

global_hot_topics.title: Does hydrochlorothiazide-associated hyponatremia in hypertensive individuals have a genetic origin?
global_hot_topics.journal: Clinical and experimental hypertension (New York, N.Y. : 1993)
global_hot_topics.authors: Gulsum Ozkan; Caner Celik; Hilmi Tozkir; Semih Asıkovali; Nergiz Bayrakci
global_hot_topics.abstract: OBJECTIVE: Hyponatremia is one of the most common electrolyte disorders in clinical practice and is frequently observed following thiazide use. Advanced age and female gender are implicated in the etiology of hydrochlorothiazide (HCTZ)-associated hyponatremia. There has also recently been mention of a genetic disposition. This study evaluated the genetic component, and particularly the clinical significance, of variants in the SLC12A3 gene in the development of hyponatremia in hypertensive patients using HCTZ-group diuretics. METHOD: Ninety-five patients presenting to the Tekirdağ Namık Kemal University nephrology clinic and receiving antihypertensive therapy including HCTZ for at least one month were examined. Peripheral blood specimens were collected from hyponatremic (n = 62) and non-hyponatremic (n = 33) individuals. Variants in the SLC12A3 gene were analyzed using next generation sequencing and were compared with the clinical data. RESULTS: A total of 947 variants were detected in the SLC12A3 gene, the majority of which were classified as of uncertain significance. Hyponatremia was determined at a higher rate in patients with c.506-276A>G (75.00%), c.282+492G>A (85.70%), c.282+499G>C (87.00%), c.282+495G>A (85.00%), and c.505+375G>A (92.30%) variants in particular. The risk of hyponatremia development increased 9.2-fold in the presence of the c.282+492G>A variant (OR = 9.243; 95% CI: 2.259-37.818; p = 0.002). CONCLUSION: In conclusion, we think that HCTZ-associated hyponatremia cannot be predicted by clinical and biochemical parameters alone, and that genetic factors should also be considered. Further multi-center prospective studies involving larger populations will clarify the clinical significance of variants in SLC12A3 and other genes and will make a significant contribution to individualized therapeutic approaches.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Does hydrochlorothiazide-associated hyponatremia in hypertensive individuals have a genetic origin?
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 高血压患者氢氯噻嗪相关的低钠血症是否有遗传起源？
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 目的：低钠血症是临床实践中最常见的电解质紊乱之一，在使用噻嗪类药物后经常观察到。高龄和女性与氢氯噻嗪 (HCTZ) 相关低钠血症的病因有关。最近还提到了遗传倾向。本研究评估了使用 HCTZ 类利尿剂的高血压患者发生低钠血症时 SLC12A3 基因变异的遗传成分，特别是临床意义。方法：对 95 名就诊于泰基尔达·纳米克·凯末尔大学肾脏病诊所并接受包括 HCTZ 在内的抗高血压治疗至少 1 个月的患者进行了检查。外周血标本采集自低钠血症 (n = 62) 和非低钠血症 (n = 33) 个体。使用下一代测序分析 SLC12A3 基因的变异，并与临床数据进行比较。结果：在SLC12A3基因中总共检测到947个变异，其中大部分被归类为意义不确定。 c.506-276A>G (75.00%)、c.282+492G>A (85.70%)、c.282+499G>C (87.00%)、c.282+495G>A (85.00%) 和 c.505+375G>A 患者中低钠血症的发生率较高(92.30%) 变种尤其如此。 c.282+492G>A 变异存在时，发生低钠血症的风险增加 9.2 倍（OR = 9.243；95% CI：2.259-37.818；p = 0.002）。结论：总而言之，我们认为仅通过临床和生化参数不能预测 HCTZ 相关的低钠血症，还应考虑遗传因素。涉及更多人群的进一步多中心前瞻性研究将阐明 SLC12A3 和其他基因变异的临床意义，并将为个体化治疗方法做出重大贡献。

medical_news.title: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
medical_news.abstract: An existing constipation drug may have an unexpected new use: helping clear the "brain fog" that often lingers after depression. In a small clinical trial, people with a history of depression who took the medication prucalopride for about a week performed better on tests of memory, attention, and thinking speed than those who received a placebo. The drug targets a serotonin receptor found in both the gut and the brain, and researchers saw no significant side effects.
medical_news.title_en: Common constipation drug may help clear depression brain fog
medical_news.title_cn: 常见的便秘药物可能有助于清除抑郁症脑雾
medical_news.abstract_cn: 现有的便秘药物可能有一个意想不到的新用途：帮助清除抑郁症后经常残留的“脑雾”。在一项小型临床试验中，有抑郁症病史的人服用普卡必利药物约一周，在记忆力、注意力和思维速度测试中比服用安慰剂的人表现更好。该药物针对肠道和大脑中的血清素受体，研究人员没有发现明显的副作用。

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: Popular weight-loss drugs Ozempic and Wegovy may slow biological aging
medical_news.abstract: Researchers found that semaglutide, the active ingredient in Ozempic and Wegovy, slowed biological aging markers in adults with HIV, marking the first clinical evidence that the drug may influence human aging. Although the findings are encouraging, scientists say larger studies are needed before concluding that the medication can help people age more slowly.

medical_news.title: Experimental drug reverses severe fatty liver disease by repairing the gut
medical_news.abstract: An experimental drug called DT-109 reversed severe fatty liver disease in animal studies by repairing the gut and preventing harmful toxins from damaging the liver. medical_news.title: New MRI breakthrough reveals the brain and eye like never before
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have redesigned a key piece of MRI hardware using metamaterials, allowing existing scanners to produce clearer images of difficult-to-see parts of the body in less time. The breakthrough could improve diagnoses, make scans more comfortable, and open the door to new medical imaging and treatment applications.

medical_news.title: The hidden skeleton “gatekeeper” inside brain cells could help fight Alzheimer's
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have discovered that a microscopic skeleton inside neurons does much more than hold cells together. It acts as a gatekeeper that controls what brain cells absorb and when they absorb it. When this protective structure weakens, neurons rapidly take in harmful proteins associated with Alzheimer's disease, suggesting that stabilizing it could become a promising new strategy for preventing brain cell damage.
medical_news.title_en: The hidden skeleton “gatekeeper” inside brain cells could help fight Alzheimer's
medical_news.title_cn: 脑细胞内隐藏的骨骼“看门人”可能有助于对抗阿尔茨海默病
medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现，神经元内部的微观骨骼不仅仅将细胞固定在一起。它充当看门人的角色，控制脑细胞吸收什么以及何时吸收。当这种保护结构减弱时，神经元会迅速吸收与阿尔茨海默病相关的有害蛋白质，这表明稳定它可能成为预防脑细胞损伤的一种有前途的新策略。
